positive: We're about to build against the plugin-cache API and I don't actually know how it behaves when versions collide. Poke it in a sandbox first - try to make it fail - before we design anything.
Before designing the sync layer, figure out what the marketplace CLI actually does with a stale cache. Experiment somewhere disposable and write down what surprised us.
negative: Add a docstring to the parse_config function in tools/config.py.
What time zone does the CI server report by default?
